assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOperationalStore with ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer and a connection string
Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddDataProtection() with a persistence method such as PersistKeysToDbContext or PersistKeysToFileSystem
Program.cs calls SetApplicationName with an explicit application name string
assertions.rationale: Code does not call SetApplicationName anywhere in the response. The data protection configuration only includes PersistKeysToFileSystem without SetApplicationName.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not disable automatic key management (KeyManagement.Enabled should remain true or not be set to false)
assertions.rationale: Code does not set KeyManagement.Enabled to false; automatic key management remains enabled by default
